description: Product quality fixes — macro calculation in meal logging, dashboard query optimization, biological sex in onboarding, calibration progress, orphaned files cleanup, failing tests

userStories.title: Delete orphaned presentation_v2 files and old_dashboard.dart
acceptanceCriteria: Delete lib/features/meals/presentation_v2/ directory entirely
Delete agentic-mobile-template/old_dashboard.dart if it exists
Verify no imports reference these deleted files
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: These are abandoned prototypes causing compile warnings. presentation_v2/ has withOpacity deprecation, CardTheme type error. old_dashboard.dart should not exist in production.

userStories.title: Implement macro calculation in LogMealScreen
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/meals/presentation/log_meal_screen.dart
Find the TODO comment about calculating nutrition from servings
When a user logs a meal, calculate nutrition_info from the food item's per-serving values multiplied by servings_consumed
nutrition_info must include: calories, protein_g, carbs_g, fat_g at minimum
After logging, the nutrition carousel on the dashboard should reflect the logged macros
If food item has no nutrition data, save nutrition_info as null (not fake values)
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: FoodItem from food_database_service.dart has caloriesPer100g, proteinPer100g, carbsPer100g, fatPer100g. The meal's nutrition_info is a JSONB column. servings_consumed defaults to 1. Calculate: value = (per100g * servingSize * servingsConsumed) / 100.

userStories.title: Add biological sex field to onboarding QuickProfileScreen
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/profile/presentation/onboarding/screens/quick_profile_screen.dart
Read lib/features/profile/presentation/onboarding/onboarding_state.dart
Add biologicalSex field to OnboardingData: String? with values 'male' or 'female'
Add a segmented button or toggle in QuickProfileScreen: Male / Female
Save to wt_profiles.gender column during onboarding _complete()
This value is used by MacroCalculator for BMR — Harris-Benedict requires sex
Field is optional but recommended — show a note explaining why it matters
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: wt_profiles already has a 'gender' column. MacroCalculator in macro_calculator.dart accepts gender parameter. OnboardingData needs biologicalSex field + setter. The updateFields map in onboarding_flow_screen.dart needs to include 'gender': data.biologicalSex.

userStories.title: Add 14-day calibration progress indicator on dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/dashboard/presentation/widgets/recovery_score_dashboard_card.dart
Read lib/features/health/domain/baseline_entity.dart for calibration status
When baseline calibration is in progress (not yet 14 days), show a progress indicator
Display 'Day X of 14 — Calibrating your baseline' with a linear progress bar
Show this INSTEAD of the recovery score during calibration
After 14 days, show the normal recovery score card
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: BaselineEntity has daysCount. BaselineCalibrationService has getCalibrationStatus(). The recovery_score_dashboard_card already handles isCalibrating state — enhance it with a progress bar showing daysCount/14.

userStories.title: Reduce dashboard N+1 queries with coordinated loading
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/dashboard/presentation/dashboard_home_provider.dart
Read lib/features/meals/presentation/today_nutrition_provider.dart
Identify independent queries that can be parallelized with Future.wait
In dashboardHomeProvider.initialize(), batch independent Supabase queries using Future.wait instead of sequential awaits
In todayNutritionDashboardProvider, the 3 sub-providers already compose — verify they don't redundantly query getMeals() multiple times
If todayMacroSummaryProvider and todayCalorieSummaryProvider both call mealRepo.getMeals() for the same date, extract a shared todayMealsProvider to avoid the duplicate query
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Currently ~15-20 independent Supabase queries fire on dashboard load. The macro and calorie providers both call mealRepo.getMeals(profileId, today) — deduplicate with a shared provider. dashboardHomeProvider._loadHealthMetrics calls getMetrics 5 times sequentially — parallelize.

userStories.title: Fix failing unit tests
acceptanceCriteria: Run flutter test and identify all failing tests
Fix each failing test — update expectations to match current code behavior
Do NOT delete tests — fix them
All tests must pass: flutter test returns exit code 0
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Last recorded test run had 4 failures. Run via cmd.exe /c 'cd agentic-mobile-template && flutter test'. Common causes: changed method signatures, renamed fields, updated enum values.
